infeasible_scenarios.scenarios: Live API key issuance and Service Integration enablement
infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Creating a Service Integration API key with Illuminate Read & Write permission requires a real PubNub Admin Portal account with Illuminate add-on access. The eval can verify that the agent reads ILLUMINATE_API_KEY from env vars and sets the correct headers but cannot exercise the live key issuance flow.

infeasible_scenarios.scenarios: End-to-end Decision execution against real published messages
infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Verifying that a Decision actually fires its actions when its threshold is crossed requires a live keyset, published messages flowing through a Business Object pipeline, and observable action side effects (PubNub publish, App Context updates, webhook receipts). This cannot be reproduced in a sandboxed file-based eval.

infeasible_scenarios.scenarios: Account-limit error replay (3 METRIC decisions per account)
infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Reproducing the 400 'A business object cannot have more than 3 associated decisions' error requires either reaching the limit on a live account or mocking the entire Admin API. The eval can verify that the agent's code lists existing decisions before creating a new one, but cannot prove the limit-handling path runs.
